files.patch:
@@ -109,3 +109,3 @@
-        /* String.getByteLength(Charset charset) */
-        if (bs.length != str.getByteLength(charset))
-            throw new Exception(charset + ": String.getByteLength failed");
+        /* String.getEncodedLength(Charset charset) */
+        if (bs.length != str.getEncodedLength(charset))
+            throw new Exception(charset + ": String.getEncodedLength failed");
